New NPCs and Journals have also been added across the world, letting you learn more about the world of Palworld through exploration.
- Halved egg incubation time in newly created “Normal” and “Hard” difficulty worlds.
13 new weapons have been added.
Put them to use in conquering new areas and high-difficulty content.
Also, by crafting an Extra Weapon Holster, you can now equip up to 6 weapons.
- Increased the amount of Pure Quartz obtainable in snowy regions.
- - For example, the Free Pal Alliance will attack in Crescent Moon Shore, while the Eternal Pyre Faction will raid Mount Obsidian.
We’ve adjusted the balance of Pal Labor Research Laboratory and added new levels and effects to various research categories.
- New high-difficulty fishing spots have been added to Sunreach and the World Tree.

The island’s settlements are overhauled across the map to include new NPCs, sub-missions, and more.
Sunreach, a mysterious new island floating in the sky…The World Tree, the heart of the Palworld story…Palpagos has grown, and a new adventure awaits.
Palworld 1.0 adds 72 new Pals to the world, bringing the total number of Pals up to an incredible 287!
The journey that began in Early Access reaches its climax, and from here, a new Palworld begins.
What awaits you at the edge of the sky may be the still-unknown memories of this island…
Adjusted the item lineup of Pal Merchants and Black Marketeers to better match each region they appear in.
Added 44 new accessories, such as the “Command Baton” that strengthens party Pals and the “Air Walker” which expands your freedom of movement.
Adjusted settings so that character shadows are now displayed in dungeons, boss areas, Sealed Realms, and other similar locations."},{"url":"https://game8.co/games/Palworld/archives/608831","title":"Sunreach Map Guide: How to Get to Sky Islands | Palworld","date":"7 days ago","content":"7 days ago — You need to defeat Bjorn and Bastigor, the Tower Boss in Feybreak. {"query":"Palworld 1.0 fishing spots difficulty location new islands settlements Sun Reach region","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uGX5VGhH2SY","title":"Palworld 1.0 - BEST Fishing Spots | Grand Master Locations & Legendary Loot","content":"Palworld 1.0 - BEST Fishing Spots | Grand Master Locations & Legendary Loot
SpookyFairy
32900 subscribers
116 likes
4643 views
16 Jul 2026
The best fishing spots in Palworld 1.0 for Legendary weapon schematics, rare Pals, Lunkers, valuable materials, Ancient Spheres, and other high-value endgame rewards.

This Palworld fishing guide covers the best places to fish, including Master and Grand Master Fishing Spots, World Tree fishing, and the best locations for different loot types. I also share useful tips to make difficult catches easier and explain where to farm Legendary schematics, special Pals, materials, and rare fishing rewards.

The video includes my favorite fishing locations at the World Tree, Sunreach, Feybreak, Rayne Syndicate Oil Rigs, Wildlife Sanctuary No. 3, Fisherman’s Point, and several hidden fishing pools that are easy to miss.

00:00 Best Fishing Spots in Palworld 1.0
00:14 World Tree – Grand Master Fishing
01:48 Best Rod, Bait & Fishing Pals
02:28 Sunreach Fishing Spots
04:47 How to Reach Sunreach
05:33 Feybreak Fishing Spots
08:55 Oil Rig Fishing Spots
09:49 Isle of the Glacial Core
10:56 Wildlife Sanctuary & Fisherman’s Point
12:11 Final Recommendations

If you enjoyed the video, make sure to drop a Like, leave a Comment letting me know your favorite part, and turn on Notifications so you never miss an upload!

DISCLAIMER: Some of the possible drops per locations based on online guides alongside self experience.

They're anchored to fast-travel statues and other landmark features so you can return reliably.**Updated for Tides of Terraria (Update 0.6) — the spot list re-pulls from our marker seed each build.**. All 355 fishing spots on the map→. Stay in your level band — fish spawns scale to the region's tier, and rods+bait upgrades unlock the higher-tier catches. Catches add Penking, Jellroy, Celaray Lux, Killamari, and the Volcano variants (Fuack Ignis, Kelpsea Ignis, Dumud, Gloopie, Killamari Primo). * **Master · Lv 50–60**Isle of the Glacial Core, Rayne Oil Rig.
